title: Phlebotomy Technician
description: Sanofi is a global biopharmaceutical company dedicated to saving lives with innovative vaccines and treatments. You'll collect clinical specimens supporting pharmaceutical research.
responsibilities: Collect blood samples from study participants following strict clinical protocols
Maintain sterile technique and adhere to OSHA bloodborne pathogen standards
Process and label specimens with precise documentation
Monitor participant safety and comfort during collection
Maintain equipment and supply inventory for collection stations
Record all collection activities in electronic health records

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; phlebotomy certification required
requirements.experience_years: 0-1 year of phlebotomy or clinical specimen collection experience

benefits: Professional development and continuing education support
Employee assistance program (EAP) with mental health services
